title: All New World of Lemmings
short_description: The third and final Lemmings game from DMA Design, featuring larger and more detailed characters.
description: All New World of Lemmings (known in North America as The Lemmings Chronicles) is a puzzle game developed by DMA Design (later known as Rockstar North) and published by Psygnosis. Released in 1994, it was DMA Design's final Lemmings game in their deal with Psygnosis. The game focused on larger, more detailed lemmings — a change that the development team later felt diminished some of the series' charm. After this entry, Psygnosis hired other studios to continue the franchise.
